propositions: The existing test pins the private constant _FAULTY_OUTPUT_SNIPPET_CHARS and greps _pai_structured source instead of exercising a retry.
The test passes even when the reask behavior is broken because it never triggers an actual retry.
A behavioral test should drive _pai_structured with a model returning malformed output on the first turn and capture the second request.
The test must assert the reask embeds the prior reply bounded to the cap.
The test must assert the [truncated] marker appears only when the prior output exceeded the cap.
The test must not assert on the private constant name or on _pai_structured source text.
